templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Standard Terms)
templates.description: Common Paper Mutual NDA Standard Terms (Version 1.0). Bilateral confidentiality terms intended to be incorporated by reference from a signed Cover Page.

templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement (Cover Page)
templates.description: Common Paper Mutual NDA Cover Page (Version 1.0). Fillable cover page that captures the parties, purpose, term, and governing law and incorporates the MNDA Standard Terms.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement (CSA)
templates.description: Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement Standard Terms (Version 2.1). Standard terms for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, used together with an Order Form Cover Page.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Design Partner Agreement Standard Terms. Governs early-access design partnerships where a partner uses a developing product and provides feedback in exchange for limited access.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
templates.description: Common Paper Service Level Agreement Standard Terms (Version 2.0). Designed to be used alongside the CSA, defining uptime targets, support response times, and service credit remedies.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement (PSA)
templates.description: Common Paper Professional Services Agreement Standard Terms (Version 1.0). Master terms for engagements where one party performs services or builds deliverables under one or more SOWs.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement (DPA)
templates.description: Common Paper Data Processing Agreement Standard Terms (Version 1.0). GDPR/UK-GDPR compliant processor terms covering subprocessing, restricted transfers (EEA SCCs and UK Addendum), security incidents, and audits.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Software License Agreement Standard Terms (Version 1.1). Standard terms for licensing on-premises or installable software, used together with an Order Form Cover Page.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Partnership Agreement Standard Terms (Version 1.0). Standard terms for commercial partnerships covering each party's obligations, trademark licensing, payments, and dispute escalation.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Common Paper Pilot Agreement Standard Terms (Version 1.1). Short-term, evaluation-only access to a product or service before committing to a full commercial agreement.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement (BAA)
templates.description: Common Paper Business Associate Agreement Standard Terms (Version 1.0). HIPAA-required terms governing a Business Associate's handling of Protected Health Information (PHI) on behalf of a Covered Entity.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Common Paper AI Addendum Standard Terms (Version 1.0). Supplements an underlying agreement to govern AI service usage, including input/output ownership, model training rights, and AI-specific disclaimers.
